name: com.guffeyholdings/token-oracle
title: TokenOracle
description: Returns real-time cost estimates and model recommendations for LLM API calls. Compares pricing across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and open-source providers. Helps agents optimize spend and stay within budget constraints.

environmentVariables.name: TOKEN_ORACLE_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the hosted TokenOracle MCP endpoint

environmentVariables.name: TOKEN_ORACLE_SUBJECT
environmentVariables.description: Optional end-user subject forwarded to the hosted service

headers.name: X-Token-Oracle-Subject
headers.description: Optional end-user subject forwarded to the hosted service
